𝗢𝗣𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗔𝗪 | Accessible, privacy-focused, web-based music production and education.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Accessible, privacy-focused, web-based music production and education.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: May 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW)
✅ Open-source (AGPL v3)
✅ No sign-up, tracking, or ads
✅ Focus on education and data-privacy
✅ Community-driven development
✅ Potential for PWA and native desktop app (Tauri)


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 117 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 44 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

openDAW is a next-generation, open-source, web-based Digital Audio Workstation (DAW) focused on democratizing music production. It prioritizes user privacy with no sign-up, tracking, or ads, and aims to make high-quality music creation tools accessible for education and personal use.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/andremichelle/openDAW

𝗛𝗨𝗡𝗬𝗨𝗔𝗡𝟯𝗗-𝟮-𝗪𝗜𝗡𝗣𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 | To provide an easy-to-install and run portable application for generating 3D models and textures on Windows using the Hunyuan3D models, optimized for hardware with limited VRAM.  🔥 Super Hot!

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Batchfile 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an easy-to-install and run portable application for generating 3D models and textures on Windows using the Hunyuan3D models, optimized for hardware with limited VRAM.
📅 Created: Jan 2025 • Updated: May 2026

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Portable package for Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1 on Windows
✅ Optimized for consumer-grade GPUs (via mmgp integration)
✅ Support for specific CUDA versions (12.9 and 12.6)
✅ Reduced VRAM/RAM requirements through model offloading
✅ Optional Developer Mode for efficient model storage
✅ Optional texture generation tools


╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 1.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 108 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 48 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a portable package for running Hunyuan3D 2.0 and 2.1 on Windows. It integrates optimizations for consumer-grade GPUs and offers versions compatible with specific CUDA versions, simplifying the setup for 3D generation tasks.

╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌╌

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/YanWenKun/Hunyuan3D-2-WinPortable

𝗗𝗪𝗠-𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗦-𝗕𝗔𝗥 | To provide users of minimalist window managers with a consolidated, real-time information display on their root window, reducing the need for separate applications or widgets.  

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users of minimalist window managers with a consolidated, real-time information display on their root window, reducing the need for separate applications or widgets.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: May 2026

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Displays weather information from OpenWeatherMap
✅ Shows network upload/download speed using ifstat
✅ Fetches Moscow Exchange (IMOEX) index data
✅ Monitors Claude Code API usage limits
✅ Retrieves Bitcoin price from Binance API
✅ Displays USD/RUB exchange rate from the Central Bank of Russia
✅ Reports RAM and CPU usage
✅ Shows battery status
✅ Includes current date and time
✅ Highly configurable via environment variables


◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐ 1 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 0 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides a minimalist status bar for window managers like dwm and dwl. It aggregates various real-time information such as weather, currency exchange rates, stock market indices, API usage limits, network speed, system resource usage (RAM, CPU), battery status, and the current date/time into a single, concise string displayed on the root window.

◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇◇

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/HelpFreedom/dwm-status-bar

𝗩𝗜𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡-𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗦 | Enabling developers to quickly build and deploy low-latency, intelligent video experiences that can watch, listen, and understand video content in real-time.  🔥 Super Hot!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: May 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time video AI processing
✅ Low-latency audio/video streaming (<30ms)
✅ Integration with LLMs (OpenAI, Gemini, Claude)
✅ Pluggable video processing pipeline (YOLO, Roboflow, custom models)
✅ Native SDKs for multiple platforms
✅ Turn detection and VAD
✅ Tool calling and MCP support
✅ Phone integration (Twilio)


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 7.7K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 634 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Vision Agents is a Python library for building real-time, multi-modal AI agents that can process video, audio, and text. It leverages Stream's edge network for low-latency communication and integrates with various AI models (like OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) and computer vision tools (like YOLO, Roboflow).

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

InvoicePlane is a self-hosted, open-source web application for managing invoices, clients, and payments. It offers robust features for creating and tracking financial documents, with a recent update enhancing PHP compatibility and security.

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Developing and deploying AI agents and AI-powered applications.

✅ Unified multi-provider LLM API (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.)
✅ Agent runtime with tool calling and state management
✅ Interactive coding agent CLI
✅ Terminal UI library with differential rendering
✅ Web components for AI chat interfaces

The pi-mono repository provides a comprehensive toolkit for building AI agents, offering a unified LLM API, an agent runtime, a coding agent CLI, and libraries for TUI and web UIs. It aims to simplify the development and deployment of AI-powered applications and agents.
